name: python3-wget
title: python3-wget
summary: pure Python download utility for Python 3
description:
pure Python download utility for Python 3
This package installs the wget module for Python version 3.x. wget module
can be used to perform basic network downloads inside a Python script.
.
More information about the usage can be found at README.txt.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-wget because pure Python download utility for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-wget as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-wget with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-wget --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
